mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( note_id, user_id, parent_comment_id, group_id, depth, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{noteId}, #{userId}, #{parentCommentId}, 0, 0, #{content}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.name AS userName, u.login_id AS loginId FROM comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.note_id = #{noteId} ORDER BY c.group_id ASC, c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( note_id, user_id, parent_comment_id, group_id, depth, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{noteId}, #{userId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{groupId}, #{depth}, #{content}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
